context_text:
SMILE INDEX: 85
WINDOW: 1263.300s to 1300.233s (smile at 1283.300s to 1285.233s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[1243.620-1284.090] interviewee: at home at Katowice, my father tells me, you know, your former boss in the pharmacy in Tarnowiec, he's looking for you, because he doesn't speak German, only Polish. And he cannot communicate with the German military.
[1284.090-1317.750] interviewee: He had to deliver to the German hospital medications. And he couldn't communicate with them. So he said, why don't you go to Auschwitz? He has a pharmacy there. And you can work there. I can help him. I went to Auschwitz.

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
He had to
